pi_items.source: Task instruction, setup script, and crawler-test.com live website
export_result.sh requires 'crawler-test.com' in expected CSV output
Crawler-test.com serves /pdf_open_parameters.pdf, confirmed via HTTP request and export_result.sh logic
Crawler-test.com HTTP response headers return 'content-type: application/pdf', confirmed via curl
Explicitly defined in export_result.sh EXPECTED_CSV variable and setup_task.sh
Explicitly defined in export_result.sh EXPECTED_REPORT variable and setup_task.sh

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the live crawler-test.com public website (non-synthetic data). It has been verified via live HTTP requests that the site serves valid PDF files with the '.pdf' extension and 'application/pdf' content type, conforming to the task expectations. The target URL, domain, and output file paths exactly match the instructions and the logic in the setup and export scripts.
